2604.09442.title: UIPress: Bringing Optical Token Compression to UI-to-Code Generation
2604.09442.paper_summary: UI-to-Code generation requires vision-language models (VLMs) to produce thousands of tokens of structured HTML/CSS from a single screenshot, making visual token efficiency critical. Existing compression methods either select tokens at inference time using task-agnostic heuristics, or zero out low-attention features without actually shortening the sequence -- neither truly reduces prefill latency or adapts to the non-uniform information density of UI screenshots. Meanwhile, optical (encoder-side learned) compression has shown strong results for document OCR, yet no prior work has adapted this paradigm to UI-to-Code generation. We propose UIPress, a lightweight learned compression module inserted between the frozen ViT encoder and the LLM decoder of Qwen3-VL-8B. UIPress combines depthwise-separable convolutions, element-guided spatial reweighting, and Transformer refinement to compress ${\sim}$6{,}700 visual tokens to a fixed budget of 256. Together with Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) on the decoder to bridge the representation gap, the entire system adds only ${\sim}$21.7M trainable parameters (0.26\% of the 8B base model). Under a fair comparison on the same base model against four baselines on Design2Code, UIPress at 256 tokens achieves a CLIP score of 0.8127, outperforming the uncompressed baseline by +7.5\% and the strongest inference-time method by +4.6\%, while delivering 9.1$\times$ time-to-first-token speedup. To the best of our knowledge, UIPress is the first encoder-side learned compression method for the UI-to-Code task.
2604.09442.paper_summary_zh: UI-to-Code 生成需要視覺語言模型 (VLMs) 從單一截圖生成數千個結構化的 HTML/CSS 標記，使得視覺標記效率至關重要。現有的壓縮方法要麼在推理時使用與任務無關的啟發式方法選擇標記，要麼在不實際縮短序列的情況下將低注意力特徵歸零——這兩者都無法真正減少預填延遲或適應 UI 截圖的非均勻信息密度。與此同時，光學（編碼器端學習的）壓縮在文檔 OCR 中顯示出強勁的結果，但之前的研究尚未將這一範式應用於 UI-to-Code 生成。我們提出了 UIPress，一個輕量級的學習壓縮模塊，插入在凍結的 ViT 編碼器和 Qwen3-VL-8B 的 LLM 解碼器之間。UIPress 結合了深度可分離卷積、元素引導的空間重加權和 Transformer 精煉，將約 6,700 個視覺標記壓縮到固定的 256 預算。連同在解碼器上進行低秩適應 (LoRA) 以彌補表示差距，整個系統僅增加約 21.7M 可訓練參數（佔 8B 基礎模型的 0.26\%）。在對同一基礎模型進行公平比較時，對比四個基準，在 Design2Code 上，UIPress 在 256 個標記下達到 0.8127 的 CLIP 分數，超過未壓縮基準 +7.5\% 和最強的推理時方法 +4.6\%，同時提供 9.1$\times$ 的首次標記速度提升。據我們所知，UIPress 是 UI-to-Code 任務中首個編碼器端學習的壓縮方法。
2604.09442.author: Dasen Dai et.al.
2604.09442.authors: Dasen Dai, Shuoqi Li, Ronghao Chen, Huacan Wang, Biao Wu, Qizhen Lan
